title: Hidrogenii, a Plug and Olin Joint Venture, Commissions 15 Ton Per Day Hydrogen Liquefaction Plant in Louisiana
content: Hidrogenii, the joint venture between Plug Power and Olin Corporation, has commissioned a 15 metric-ton-per-day hydrogen liquefaction plant in St. Gabriel, Louisiana. The facility is one of the largest electrolytic hydrogen liquefaction plants in North America and will liquefy hydrogen produced by Olin for U.S. shipments. This plant increases Plug's total production capacity to 40 TPD, supporting the U.S. transition to low-carbon energy and strengthening the regional hydrogen supply chain. The facility is part of Plug's broader strategy to expand its national green hydrogen network.
author: Aru Somya
